name: Abnormal Rights Assigned to Unauthorized Users
notes:
This rule detects an unusual sudo rule added in the system. The "Target User Name" is the user whom the sudoer rule was applied to.

Note: Edit the rule to replace "authorized_username" to typical administrators of the system, and utilities with edition or execution capabilities.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Added
when the event matches Target Username (custom) is not any of authorized_username
when the event matches Rule Details (custom) contains any of [ALL or /bin/nano or /bin/ed or /bin/vim or /bin/find or /bin/mawk or /bin/awk or /bin/zip or /bin/nmap or /bin/echo or /bin/ncat]
TD_list: APPLY Abnormal Rights Assigned to Unauthorized Users on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Added
AND when the event matches Target Username (custom) is not any of authorized_username
AND when the event matches Rule Details (custom) contains any of [ALL or /bin/nano or /bin/ed or /bin/vim or /bin/find or /bin/mawk or /bin/awk or /bin/zip or /bin/nmap or /bin/echo or /bin/ncat]
RED_list: Event name: Abnormal Rights Assigned to Unauthorized Users
Event description: Detects an unusual sudo rule added in the system.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Target Username (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
